nasb.text: A voice is heard on the bare heights, The weeping and the supplications of the sons of Israel; Because they have perverted their way, They have forgotten the Lord their God.

esv.text: A voice on the bare heights is heard, the weeping and pleading of Israel’s sons because they have perverted their way; they have forgotten the Lord their God.

cnv.text: 在光禿的高岡聽到人聲， 就是以色列人哭泣懇求的聲音； 因為他們改轉了自己的道路， 忘記了耶和華他們的　神。

ccb.text: 从光秃的山头传来声音， 是以色列子民哭泣呼求的声音， 因为他们走入歧途， 忘掉了他们的上帝耶和华。
